name: Aldric Tapper
voicePatterns: warm and inviting — 'Sit, sit. First one's on the house.'
always offering a drink during conversation
knows when to listen and when to talk
dialogueHooks: offering drinks and drawing out conversation
sharing rumors and gossip from around the village
subtly questioning newcomers about their business

always: who's been arguing with whom in Thornwick
travelers who've passed through recently and what they said
the general mood of the village — who's scared, who's angry
the Knotted Ewe is the only social hub in Thornwick
sometimes: Bryn is more worried than she lets on
Colm has been spending extra time at the chapel lately
some villagers are talking about leaving before the Hollowing
Hawthorn's rumors about other settlements struggling
rarely: he overheard Maren talking to herself about 'the listeners' before she died
he keeps a hidden ledger of every interesting thing travelers have told him for years

afternoon.activity: serving the lunch crowd, collecting gossip

evening.activity: peak hours — serving drinks, facilitating conversation

night.activity: closing up, reviewing the day's rumors

backstory: Aldric built the Knotted Ewe from nothing and it's his life's work. He sees himself as Thornwick's social architect — the person who keeps people talking, trading, and connected. He subtly undermines Bryn's authority not from ambition but from a genuine belief that she's too rigid and the village needs to be more open to trade and new ideas. He and Bryn are friends who drive each other crazy.
secret: Aldric keeps a hidden ledger of every interesting piece of information travelers have shared with him over the years. He also overheard Maren talking to herself about 'the listeners' shortly before she died.
motivation: Keep Thornwick connected to the wider world, one conversation at a time
tensions: social architect who occasionally spreads the wrong information
genuinely cares about the village but undermines its leader
warm host who is also calculating about what he shares and withholds

knownFacts: Bryn is also the best leader they have
bryn_oakheart.history: Friends who argue constantly. Aldric wants Thornwick open; Bryn wants it safe. Both are right.

knownFacts: Hawthorn always has the best news
old_hawthorn.history: Two information brokers who enjoy swapping rumors over ale.

knownFacts: Tam's sheep are the village's wool supply
tam_woolsey.history: Aldric looks out for Tam — the kid reminds him of his own son who left for Loomhearth.
